message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core

caption Proprietary and Confidential

actor "User/Admin" as user

box "Smart Edge Open Controller Components" #lightblue
    participant "CLI" as cli #lightgreen
    participant "Af Microservice" as af #lightblue
end box

box "5G Core Components" #lightgreen
    participant "NEF" as nef #lightgreen
    participant "NGC CP Function" as ngc #lightgreen
end box

note over nef : Smart Edge Open provided\nCore component with\nlimited functionality

group Policy Authorization - Application Session Context GET flow

    user -> cli : Get app session context with\nappSessionId
    cli -> af : /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\nGET
    af -> ngc : /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\nGET
    af <.. ngc : 200 OK: app-session\ninformation \\ ERROR
    cli <.. af : 200 OK: app-session\ninformation\\ ERROR
    user <.. cli : Success: app-session\ninformation

end

footer Intel Corporation
@enduml
```
